The tests check for 'ai-reproduction-confirmed' and 'ai-reproduction-failed' as substrings, which would match both. no_solution_leakage.reason: The instruction explicitly specifies exact variable names ($labelToAdd, $labelToRemove, $foundPR, $LabelConfirmed, $LabelFailed), exact function name (Update-VerificationLabels), exact parameter name (-ReproductionConfirmed), exact HTTP methods (DELETE for removal, POST for addition), exact error handling mechanism ($LASTEXITCODE), and exact number of call sites (4 paths). This is essentially a complete implementation specification, not a problem description.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on gold-specific implementation details: exact variable names '$labelToAdd' and '$labelToRemove' (test_update_labels_function_logic), exact variable '$foundPR' (test_pr_detection_fallback), exact function name 'Update-VerificationLabels' with exact parameter '-ReproductionConfirmed' (test_labels_called_on_all_paths). A correct alternative using different variable names (e.g., $addLabel/$removeLabel) or a different function signature would fail.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Every fail-to-pass test reads file content as text and checks for string patterns (e.g., '$labelToAdd' in body, 'DELETE' in body, 'gh pr list' in content). No test actually executes the PowerShell script, imports the function, or verifies runtime behavior. All tests are pure text/regex matching on file contents.

test_not_tautological.reason: The tests check for specific function definitions, variable assignments, API method keywords, and multiple call sites that wouldn't be present in stub/empty implementations. A default or empty file would fail all f2p tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: The instruction's main requirements (label function with toggle logic, label constants, function calls on all 4 paths, PR detection fallback, SKILL.md updates) are all tested by corresponding test functions.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are well-organized with descriptive names, grouped into sections (Gates, Fail-to-pass, Pass-to-pass) with clear comments and docstrings explaining each test's purpose.

structured_data_schema.reason: The task produces PowerShell scripts and Markdown documentation, not structured data like JSON/CSV/API/DB schemas.

no_typos.reason: The instruction specifies label values as 'ai-reproduction-confirmed' and 'ai-reproduction-failed', but the gold solution uses 's/ai-reproduction-confirmed' and 's/ai-reproduction-failed' (with 's/' prefix). This discrepancy could mislead the agent — though tests happen to pass either way due to substring matching.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The instruction specifies exact variable names ($labelToAdd, $labelToRemove, $foundPR), exact function name (Update-VerificationLabels), exact parameter name (-ReproductionConfirmed), exact HTTP methods per operation, and exact number of code paths (4). This goes far beyond describing what's broken and essentially dictates the implementation.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: This is a code/documentation editing task, not a config-edit task.
